author: Manuel Magaña
description: Empower your vault with Google Gemini. This AI agent integrates Google's artificial intelligence language models to help you perform tasks and conduct web searches.

manifest.author: Manuel Magaña López
manifest.description: Empower your vault with Google Gemini. This AI agent integrates Google's artificial intelligence language models to help you perform tasks and conduct web searches.
manifest.name: AI Agent

name: AI Agent

releases.author: TheManuelML
releases.description:
# Small changes
- New 3.1 Gemini models
- `open-agent-sidebar` -> `toggle-agent-sidebar` hotkey fix to allow the user to also close if its already open. fbae49b869ca8c4ff83aa54d413abd736dbd625f


I am no longer looking to update this plugin besides updating the gemini models.

releases.author: TheManuelML
releases.description:
# Patch 1.1.1

-  Custom base URL: 551aca224c2c7843f18595d7625dd7da4b930342
- New gemini 3 flash in the model selection: #7

releases.author: TheManuelML
releases.description:
# New mayor update v1.1.0

## New features
- Reasoning blocks are now displayed
- Look at the arguments and tool responses in the tool blocks
> [!WARNING]  
> If you decide to update to this new version your old chats will no longer work. The reasoning blocks and the tool responses modify the messages metadata.
- Check web sources when executing the `web search` tool in the tool responses
- Show the relative path of a note in the add context modal
- Review the agent changes to accept or decline changes before this ones are made after an `edit note` tool call

releases.author: TheManuelML
releases.description:
## New features 
- Last message preview when selecting a chat from the chat history modal
- Model descriptions gathered from the google models page
- If no messages has been sent in a chat the view shows a message to tell the users what to do
03f3d47522a34ccc81db39ff0081b90d7780ee1c


## New model
**gemini 3.0 pro preview** (make sure to have at least Tier I subscription, the model do not have a free tier). This model hasnt been tested yet, if you find any problem using it, open an Issue.
88997a56d69f080a710eeb05656a3e60096a3b92

releases.author: TheManuelML
releases.description:
## New features
 - **Menu Items:** Right click over selected text on a markdown note (on edit mode) to open the actions menu, where you can ask the agent to summarize or to explain the selection. 20d95828baacec4ba87bbe973d9196ab44f79af3
- **New input design:** Border loader animation. 6252ebee3983899c3a8f64c40269237ad466801d & ed9d8e33dea43ffcc027d3a5834663c027d972d1

releases.author: TheManuelML
releases.description:
### New features
- **New tool:** `filter notes` — Returns a list of note paths within a specified date range.  
  You can choose whether to filter by creation or modification date, set a note limit, and sort results by *asc* or *desc*.   TheManuelML/obsidian-agent@48fd26cf75ee2e0d721ac58ff0b837219514d20d
- **Image retention option:** When reading notes containing images, you can now choose to keep the images so the model can process them. TheManuelML/obsidian-agent@d85d411a76d095645afc0cb0ecd8952dba95d83c & TheManuelML/obsidian-agent@22a067b3731cd7366793a57adfcb42151c4b206d
### Bugs fixed
- **create note:** The tool no longer generates random tags. TheManuelML/obsidian-agent@19c6eecedcc6241ef185aea38442f05a12fe2b31
### Refactors
- Reorganized `utils` into subfolders for better maintainability. TheManuelML/obsidian-agent@d39ebca32fac784826ef61dcedfe8028f5ecb8e8
- Updated to the latest LangChain packages. TheManuelML/obsidian-agent@006f1c682dca51fdfc29a0ff81812c2998716ba9
